summary: Tested CEO Commission Approval Workflow features: 1) POST /api/commissions/approve - CEO can approve/revoke sales and CS commissions, 2) GET /api/commissions/approval-status - returns approval status, 3) GET /api/commissions/dashboard - CEO view includes approvals field, non-CEO view includes approval_status field, 4) Non-CEO users blocked from approval endpoint (403), 5) Commission Dashboard UI shows approval controls for CEO and status banners for non-CEO users, 6) Closed leads (enrolled/rejected) have distinct background colors in SalesCRM. Backend: 15/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
passed_tests: CEO can access commission dashboard with approvals field
Non-CEO sees approval_status field in dashboard
CS Agent sees approval_status field in dashboard
CEO Commission Dashboard shows Sales/CS tabs with approval controls
CEO can click Approve Sales Commissions button
Sales Executive sees 'pending CEO approval' banner
CS Agent sees 'pending CEO approval' banner
Enrolled cards have stage-enrolled CSS class
Frontend compiles without errors (only deprecation warning)
critical_code_review_comments: Approval stored in commission_approvals collection with month, department, status, approved_by fields
CEO dashboard includes approvals dict with sales/cs status (line 26455-26456)
Non-CEO dashboard includes approval_status field based on their department (line 26459-26463)
CommissionDashboard.jsx correctly renders approval controls for CEO and status banners for non-CEO
CSS stage-enrolled and stage-rejected classes apply correct background colors (index.css lines 161-167)

success_rate.backend: 94% (15/16 tests passed - 1 false positive due to fixture reset)

context_for_next_testing_agent: CEO Commission Approval Workflow fully tested and working. CEO can approve/revoke sales and CS commissions via POST /api/commissions/approve. Non-CEO users see approval_status in their dashboard (pending/approved). Commission Dashboard UI shows approval controls for CEO (Approve/Revoke buttons) and status banners for non-CEO users. Closed leads (enrolled/rejected) have distinct background colors via CSS classes stage-enrolled (emerald) and stage-rejected (rose). Note: CS Head credentials (falja@clt-academy.com) did not work - used CS Agent (nasida@clt-academy.com) instead.

commission_dashboard_ui.description: CEO sees approval controls, non-CEO sees status banners
commission_dashboard_ui.verification: CEO has Approve/Revoke buttons, non-CEO has pending/approved banners

closed_leads_color_coding.description: Enrolled/rejected leads have distinct background colors
